stimulus: Marine biologist Halima Said and her research team have devoted their careers to studying coral reefs off the coast of Tanzania. In 2019, the team mapped a previously undocumented reef near Mafia ______blank in the seasons that followed they identified twelve additional reef systems and catalogued more than 80 endemic species.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. Both sides of the blank are independent clauses ("the team mapped...Island" and "in the seasons that followed they identified...species"). A comma plus the coordinating conjunction "and" correctly joins two independent clauses.

Choice B is incorrect because a comma alone produces a comma splice. Choice C is incorrect because the coordinating conjunction "and" needs a preceding comma to join two independent clauses. Choice D is incorrect because the two independent clauses are fused without any punctuation, creating a run-on sentence.
